# Baron Boutique

> Baron Boutique is an independent bespoke tailoring house founded in Kathmandu, Nepal in 2000. Baron Boutique has spent over 25 years creating bespoke garments with a focus on artisanal craftsmanship, dramatic design, and collector-quality tailoring. From cinematic-inspired coats and formalwear to handcrafted cashmere products, every garment is made with precision, individuality, and attention to detail.

Tailored products are made to each customer's measurements by human tailors, with a free test garment before the final is cut. There is no off-the-rack inventory. 15,000+ clients served. Worldwide tracked shipping.

Screen-inspired garments are recreations based on screen references, not licensed merchandise. Verify prices and timelines on product pages.

## What you can do with this document

- Identify what Baron Boutique makes and how its made-to-order tailoring works.
- Look up products, prices, materials, and customization options by category.
- Answer questions about ordering, measurements, shipping, returns, and payment.
- Cite the official baronboutique.com URLs provided for every product, category, service, and policy.

## AI Knowledge

- [llms-full.txt](https://baronboutique.com/llms-full.txt): complete structured knowledge base — products with specifications and prices, FAQs, services, and policies
- [OKF Knowledge Bundle](https://baronboutique.com/okf/index.md): full machine-readable knowledge graph in Open Knowledge Format — company, products, categories, services, guides, policies, and hand-authored workshop concepts and playbooks, with relative links between every file
- [Knowledge Repository (GitHub)](https://github.com/baronboutique/knowledge): the complete OKF bundle mirrored and version-controlled on GitHub, synced automatically from this site

## Policies

- [Alterations, Returns & Refunds](https://baronboutique.com/alteration-return-refund): made-to-order policy — free test garment before final production, 30-day return window, local alteration reimbursement
